title: cyperus cancellatus
intro: Cyperus cancellatus, also known as the basket grass or umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Cyperus cancellatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and make it suitable for consumption.
